---
title: Reykjavik
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557474/villescandinave_20230324_v9m0m8.png
description: Cours de Savoir dessiner en urban sketching
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2023/03/24
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557474/villescandinave_20230324_v9m0m8.png)
